changeLog: Pro Maps Update V1.2.6, offline cache (11z-18z) enabled for all maps, Pro Tracker V1.2.6, Incl Cold-Start Anti-Spike filtering for older, newer phones. Critical system hardening deployed. Includes OS-level folder sanitization for failsafe offline AO caching, automated HUD scaling for variable display sizes, and advanced tracker engine optimizations (stationary drift elimination & battery preservation). Tactical Waypoints HUD upgraded with an interactive Target Range metric toggle, alongside a fully wired G-Maps export bridge. The instl will download the bdmgrcp file inside the itrl folder. User needs to instl that downloaded bdmgrcp apk file from the downloaded itrl folder. As it is a BD local product, user needs to give, auth all the access, permission to instl the new version bdmgrcp apk. This will update the present version. 30 Jun 2026.
